title: Monthly Sea Fisheries Statistics October 2025
body: "Highlights   The total quantity of landings by UK vessels (tonnes) decreased in October 2025 compared to 2024, down 30%. The value of landings in October 2025 (£157.5m) also decreased compared to 2024 down by 20%. Landings in October 2025 were comprised of mostly Pelagic species (69%). Pelagic species also comprised the majority of the value landed (65%).  "
